fallow.config.title: Fallow
fallow.config.enabled.tooltip: Master switch. Fallow changes blocks over time and can be destructive, so it ships OFF. Nothing happens until this is on; the toggles below have no effect while it is off. Back up worlds you care about.
fallow.config.vegetation.tooltip: Grass, flowers, and bushes slowly fill in on grass blocks over time.
fallow.config.short_grass.tooltip: Chance per sampled block that a bare grass block sprouts short grass. Highest of the four chances by design.
fallow.config.tall_grass.tooltip: Chance that existing short grass grows into tall grass.
fallow.config.flower.tooltip: Chance to sprout a flower from this biome's own flower list (the same list bonemeal uses, so datapack biomes work).
fallow.config.bush.tooltip: Chance to sprout a bush copied from one already growing nearby. Lowest of the four chances by design.
fallow.config.density.tooltip: Skip flower/bush sprouting when this many already grow in the local area, so meadows don't saturate. The radius is configurable in fallow.json.
fallow.config.dieback.tooltip: Plants in permanently dark, enclosed spots (roofed over - judged by skylight, so night doesn't count) decay step by step: tall grass to short, short grass gone, bare grass block to dirt. Winter accelerates it.
fallow.config.trails.tooltip: Repeated footsteps wear grass into coarse dirt and then into a dirt path. Untrodden trails slowly recover. Thresholds in fallow.json.
fallow.config.saplings.tooltip: Verified natural trees (log column rooted in dirt, non-persistent leaves above) seed matching saplings nearby, so forests creep. Player log builds never qualify. Per-tree rates and radii in fallow.json.
fallow.config.leaf_litter.tooltip: Forest floors develop under dense natural canopy: grass slowly converts to podzol or rooted dirt. Fastest in autumn and winter.
fallow.config.shoreline.tooltip: Waterline ground occasionally sprouts sugar cane; shallow water floors sprout seagrass. Vanilla placement rules decide where.
fallow.config.overcrowding.tooltip: Where grass packs too tight (more than a neighbor threshold), it thins out - tall grass reverts to short, short grass disappears. Culls hardest in winter. Thresholds in fallow.json.
fallow.config.flower_wilt.tooltip: Flowers fade through autumn and winter (and bloom back in spring via the spring growth boost). Off: flowers never wilt.
fallow.config.visuals.tooltip: Client-side seasonal grass and leaf tinting - vivid spring, straw autumn, pale winter, vanilla summer. Blends day by day. Strength in fallow.json.
fallow.config.seasons.tooltip: Four seasons cycling on a fixed number of in-game days. Off: the season freezes and all seasonal modifiers go neutral.
fallow.config.winter_growth.tooltip: Growth multiplier in winter (near zero by default). Spring, summer, and autumn multipliers are in fallow.json.
fallow.config.day_night.tooltip: Longer days in summer, longer nights in winter - the full cycle stays 24000 ticks. Uses the vanilla clock-rate mechanism; off = vanilla timing untouched.
fallow.config.summer_day.tooltip: Share of the cycle that is daylight at midsummer. 50% = vanilla.
fallow.config.winter_day.tooltip: Share of the cycle that is daylight at midwinter. 50% = vanilla.
fallow.config.crops.tooltip: Enables the crop layer: fallow:* crop blocks placed in the world. Ships off by default because planted crops do not uninstall cleanly.
fallow.config.diet.tooltip: Tracks the last N meals across food groups and grants Absorption when the diet is varied enough. Window size and tiers in fallow.json.
